response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional full-stack engineering depth, TDD philosophy, and direct AI-agent infrastructure experience that align with core job requirements. If identity is verified and Nest.js experience can be confirmed through conversation, the technical fit would strengthen significantly.
